The Guru occupies its own Nal<shatra and it rules the Nakshatra which
contains the Shukra. The Guru fully aspects both the Lagna and the
Chandra·lagna and being the ruler of a Trine and the occupant of a
Kendra strengthens both the Lagna and the Chandra-Lagna by its full
aspect thereof. The Guru ruleS the u tn house from the Lagna which in
the case or the Guru is not a serious Dosha. The Guru rules the Kendras
from the <:handra-lagna.
In the Navamsa chart the Guru is not weak. It is conjoined by its
